executives.name: William Oplinger
executives.background: William F. Oplinger is President and Chief Executive Officer of Alcoa Corporation. He has been with Alcoa since 2000 and previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operations Officer from February 2023 to September 2023, and as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from November 2016 to February 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operations Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Molly Beerman
executives.background: Molly S. Beerman is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. She previously served as Senior Vice President and Controller from 2019 to 2023 and has held various financial leadership roles at Alcoa since 2001.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Renato Bacchi
executives.background: Renato Bacchi is Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. He joined Alcoa in 1997 and has held leadership positions in energy, treasury, and business development.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer

executives.name: Andrew Hastings
executives.background: Andrew P. Hastings is Executive Vice President and General Counsel. He joined Alcoa in 2023 from Lundin Mining Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Steven Williams
board_of_directors.background: Steven W. Williams is the Non-Executive Chairman of the Board. He is the former President and CEO of Suncor Energy Inc.

board_of_directors.name: William Oplinger
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Alcoa Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: James Nevels
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Chairman of The Swarthmore Group.

board_of_directors.name: Carol Roberts
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Vice President and CFO of International Paper Company.
